overall.description: First-person perspective from a bus driver's cabin navigating through heavy rain on a multi-lane urban road. The bus encounters increasing traffic congestion, stops at a red traffic light for an extended period, and proceeds as the light turns green. The footage appears to be from a bus simulator game with realistic rain effects, windshield wipers, and vehicle physics.

segments.scene_description: The bus travels along a rain-soaked multi-lane urban road with windshield wipers active. Trees line both sides of the street while modern buildings are visible on the right. The bus overtakes a blue sedan on the right as it maintains a steady speed through the moderate traffic.

events.description: bus encounters heavy traffic congestion and begins slowing significantly
bus comes to a complete stop behind a blue sedan at the red traffic light

agents.ego_description: slowing the bus and bringing it to a complete stop as traffic backs up at the intersection ahead

notable_agents.action: blue sedan slowing to a stop directly ahead of the bus
white van moving slowly in the left adjacent lane

entered.detail: traffic light showing red signal ahead
blue sedan that becomes the vehicle directly in front of the bus

segments.scene_description: As the bus approaches the intersection, traffic density increases significantly and the vehicle slows to a stop. The blue sedan ahead comes to a halt at the red traffic light, and a white van is visible in the adjacent lane. The windshield wipers continue clearing the heavy rain as the bus waits in the growing queue.

scene_state.functional_zone: stopped at intersection waiting for traffic signal

agents.ego_description: waiting stationary at the red traffic light with the blue car directly ahead

notable_agents.action: blue sedan stopped at red light directly in front of the bus
beige sedan waiting in the lane to the right of the bus

entered.detail: light-colored sedan visible in the right lane next to the bus

segments.scene_description: The bus remains stationary at the red traffic light for an extended period, positioned close behind the blue sedan. A beige sedan waits in the lane to the right. The heavy rain continues with wipers sweeping across the windshield, and street lights become visible as the scene remains paused at the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: proceeding through intersection on green light

events.description: traffic light turns green and vehicles begin moving through the intersection

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the intersection as the traffic light turns green, following the blue car ahead

notable_agents.action: blue sedan accelerating through the intersection ahead of the bus

entered.detail: the intersection opening up as the bus proceeds through on green

segments.scene_description: The traffic light turns green and the bus accelerates forward through the intersection, following the blue sedan ahead. The vehicle leaves the stopped traffic behind and continues along the wet multi-lane road, with windshield wipers still active against the persistent heavy rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus cabin as it navigates a rain-soaked urban road, transitioning from steady movement to a complete standstill before accelerating once more. It begins with the bus cruising past roadside trees and modern buildings, overtaking a blue sedan while windshield wipers sweep away the heavy rain. As the bus approaches an intersection, the traffic density increases and the vehicle slows to a halt behind the blue sedan and alongside a white van. The scene remains paused at the red light, with the camera lingering on the surrounding queue of cars and the glow of street lights amidst the persistent downpour. Finally, the traffic light turns green, and the bus accelerates forward through the intersection, leaving the congestion behind to continue along the wet multi-lane road.
